description: Shop is Shopify's consumer shopping app and product discovery service. It lets users browse products from brands and merchants, and its public developer-facing endpoints provide product search and product detail retrieval.
summary: Shop exposes a public MCP server at `https://shop.app/mcp` and a public HTTP API at `https://server.shop.app` with an OpenAPI spec at `https://server.shop.app/openai/v1/api.json`.
